name: Carrott Puree a La Carlotta
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut the carrots into thin slices; put them in a pot. Fill up with the broth and simmer for 10-12 minutes.
2. Add the instant potatoes and puree everything at high speed for 2 minutes.
3. Put all of this back into a clean pot and stir constantly with a wooden spoon over medium heat until warmed through.
4. Mix in a little cream; ensure the puree is not too thin.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
